channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: KuCoin EU hires new AML chief after Austria ban on new business under MiCA
item.description: KuCoin EU hires a new AML chief and deputies in Vienna weeks after Austria’s regulator banned the MiCA‑licensed exchange from taking on new business over compliance gaps.

item.title: White House Weighs Reinstating Anthropic for Federal Use Amid Pentagon Fight: Report
item.description: Trump officials reportedly drafted guidance to help agencies access Anthropic’s AI, including Claude Mythos, despite Pentagon restrictions.

item.title: JPMorgan’s new blockchain chief once warned that tokenization does not equal liquidity
item.description: JPMorgan’s new crypto head Oliver Harris warns that tokenizing assets isn't a magic fix for liquidity, but believes the technology is finally ready to "rip out" and replace the financial industry's legacy back end.

item.title: The ‘tokenization of everything’ is no longer a theory
item.description: Wall Street is moving in. Washington has changed sides. And Consensus 2026 is where crypto’s biggest inflection point gets decided.

item.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Dip as Fed Holds Rates Steady for Third Straight Time
item.description: Wednesday's FOMC meeting was expected to be Jerome Powell’s last as Federal Reserve chair.

item.title: U.S. senator holding cards on Clarity Act's next move says it's ready to get to hearing
item.description: Senator Thom Tillis was at the center of the legislative negotiations over stablecoin yield that have delayed the market structure bill, but he said it's time to go.

item.title: Realmint launches to give retail investors a smarter way into RWAs
item.description: Realmint officially launches today, opening doors for retail investors to access RWAs through a smarter, data-driven platform.

item.title: Fed leaves rates unchanged at Jerome Powell's final meeting as chairman
item.description: The U.S. Federal Reserve's next meeting in June is likely to be led by Kevin Warsh after he cleared a Senate Banking Committee vote on Wednesday.

item.title: Most crypto investors believe Bitcoin is undervalued: Coinbase survey
item.description: Coinbase survey results and onchain data suggest that Bitcoin is undervalued and at the tail end of its bear market phase.

item.title: U.K.'s Farage faces standards probe over $6.7 million gift from Tether billionaire Christopher Harborne
item.description: The Conservative and Labour parties argued Nigel Farage broke Commons rules by not declaring the £5 million, but Reform UK said it was an exempt, personal, unconditional gift.

item.title: Tether Stakeholder Gave Farage Undisclosed $6.7M Gift Amid Reform UK Crypto Funding Scrutiny
item.description: The personal gift to the Reform UK leader from billionaire Christopher Harborne comes amid scrutiny over crypto industry political funding.

item.title: Visa adds Polygon, Base support as stablecoin settlement run rate hits $7B
item.description: Visa broadens its crypto pilot to nine blockchains as stablecoin volumes grow, highlighting early traction for onchain settlement in global payments.

item.title: Changelly turns 11, reaches 12 million users, and expands global partner network
item.description: Changelly, a leading instant cryptocurrency exchange and trusted blockchain API provider, is marking its 11th anniversary with a new company milestone.

item.title: Robinhood, Coinbase lead crypto stock rout as Trump rejects Iran plan
item.description: President Trump reportedly rejected Iran's offer to end the U.S. blockade and open the Strait of Hormuz, sending crude oil prices surging 6%.

item.title: OpenAI Sued Over Failure to Warn Police Before Tumbler Ridge Mass Shooting
item.description: A California lawsuit could test whether AI companies have a legal duty to report violent threats after a mass shooting in British Columbia.

item.title: Canadian Government Pushes for Sweeping Ban on Bitcoin, Crypto ATMs
item.description: The country hosts nearly 4,000 crypto ATMs, second only to the U.S.

item.title: Dogecoin leads pre-FOMC rally with 12% gains: Is DOGE price headed to $0.33?
item.description: Dogecoin’s latest rebound resembled bounces witnessed in mid-2023, raising the odds of a rally toward $0.33 in the coming weeks.

item.title: Bitcoin's widely tracked Coinbase Premium turns negative as realized losses spike to $6 billion
item.description: A metric tracking U.S. spot demand has flipped red just as onchain data shows realized losses surging to $5.97 billion.

item.title: The Protocol: Mythos forces crypto industry to rethink security practices
item.description: Also: Aave’s $300 million recovery effort, crypto for AI agents, and Bitcoin proposal for Satoshi-linked tokens.

item.title: Hyperliquid is preparing to take on Polymarket with a new way to trade real-world events
item.description: Hyperliquid is gearing up to challenge Polymarket with a zero-fee entry for event betting as the $63 billion prediction market sector continues to explode.

item.title: The AI-crypto disconnect: Why Pantera’s CEO thinks institutions are missing the boat on bitcoin
item.description: Pantera Capital CEO Dan Morehead says the "biggest divergence in history" has left AI stocks fully priced while bitcoin remains massively undervalued at 43% below its historical trend.

item.title: MoonPay Launches Institutional Division, Acquires Crypto Key Management Firm Sodot
item.description: Crypto payments processor MoonPay is expanding into institutional services with a veteran regulator at the helm.

item.title: Visa expands stablecoin settlement network as volume hits $7 billion run rate
item.description: The payments giant added support for Stripe's Tempo, Circle's Arc, Coinbase's Base, Polygon and Canton Network as stablecoins gain traction in global money movement.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs fuel institutional surge, 21Shares' CIO sees $100K possible by year-end
item.description: Bitcoin’s growing ETF inflows and institutional adoption are reinforcing its role in portfolios, even as prices struggle below $80,000.

item.title: Polymarket Eyes US Return for Crypto Exchange as Lone CFTC Chair Weighs Approval​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
item.description: With four of five CFTC commissioner seats vacant, the decision on whether to lift Polymarket's U.S. ban rests with Chair Michael Selig alone.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: Guide, deliver, repeat: the hidden driver of token performance
item.description: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Jordan Brewer writes on the missing piece in token markets: institutional-grade investor relations. Then, Martin Burgherr breaks down how crypto markets are maturing, becoming more efficient a…

item.title: Visa Adds Base, Polygon, Canton, Arc and Tempo to Stablecoin Settlement Program
item.description: Payments giant Visa scales its blockchain settlement infrastructure with five new networks as pilot program shows 50% quarterly growth.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Computershare Taps Securitize to Tokenize Thousands of Company Stocks on Wall Street
item.description: The BlackRock-backed firm was recently selected as by the New York Stock Exchange as a tokenization specialist.

item.title: Wall Street is launching the first ever prediction market ETFs for U.S. elections
item.description: SEC-regulated funds use swaps tied to binary-event contracts and aim to expand access to election trading through retail brokerage accounts.

item.title: MoonPay buys crypto security firm Sodot in $100M push into institutional crypto
item.description: MoonPay has acquired Israel-based crypto security infrastructure provider Sodot, forming the foundation of its new institutional unit led by former CFTC Acting Chair Caroline Pham.

item.title: Wall Street is coming to Consensus Miami — and it’s not just to watch
Monthly prediction market volume hits $25.7B as user activity shifts beyond one-off events
item.description: A new report by Bitget Wallet and Polymarket found that retail users are driving repeat activity on prediction markets, signaling a shift from one-off bets to continuous engagement.

item.title: Stellar’s CMO says crypto must ditch hype and “get rich slow” to win mainstream trust
item.description: Stellar’s new marketing chief says crypto’s future hinges on long-term value creation, not hype cycles or technical jargon.

item.title: Bitcoin's Upside Capped by $82K Sell Wall as UAE’s OPEC Exit Triggers Risk Sell-Off
item.description: Multiple $3.3 million sell walls sit between $80,400 and $82,000 as oil volatility and rising real rates keep Bitcoin trapped.

item.title: Andre Cronje says DeFi is ‘no longer DeFi’ as builders debate circuit breakers
item.description: Flying Tulip’s Andre Cronje says circuit breakers can give teams time to respond during abnormal outflows, while Curve’s Michael Egorov warns they may create new human vulnerabilities.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Litecoin (LTC) gains 2.4%, leading index higher
item.description: Aptos (APT), up 1.7% since Tuesday, joined Aptos (APT) as a top performer.

item.title: XRP set for ‘strongest’ 2026 monthly ETF inflows as bulls target $2
item.description: XRP price technicals are favoring a potential rebound to $2.15 as long as support at $1.40 is held, and institutional demand remains elevated.

item.title: DeFi shaken by $292 million hack, but showing resilience, Standard Chartered says
item.description: The AAVE-led response and new safeguards underscore the sector's maturity as the bank maintains its $2 trillion RWA outlook.

item.title: Securitize, Computershare open path for $70 trillion in U.S. stocks to move onchain
item.description: The tie-up between the tokenization specialist and transfer agent giant lets public companies issue blockchain-based shares without changing market structure.

item.title: GSR says Crypto Core3 ETF is simple gateway for mainstream investors
item.description: A new actively managed ETF aims to simplify crypto investing by bundling Bitcoin, Ethereum and Solana into one rebalanced portfolio.

item.title: ZetaChain dismissed bug report that could have prevented $334K exploit
item.description: The vulnerability behind ZetaChain's $334,000 exploit had been reported through its bug bounty program before the attack but was dismissed.

item.title: Morning Minute: Paul Tudor Jones Calls Bitcoin Strongest Inflation Hedge
item.description: Crypto majors rebound ahead of FOMC, despite oil surging, while Polymarket is making a push to enter the U.S.

item.title: Ethereum ICO Whale Who Turned $3,100 Into $23M Wakes Up After a Decade
item.description: A wallet dormant since 2015 just moved 10,000 ETH—but analysts say a custody restructuring, not a sell, is the likely explanation.

item.title: Dunamu, Hana Financial take blockchain remittance system live with POSCO
item.description: South Korea's Hana Financial, POSCO International and Upbit operator Dunamu have moved their blockchain remittance system into live trade transactions.

item.title: Polymarket pushes for broader US relaunch with CFTC talks: Report
item.description: Polymarket is reportedly in talks with the CFTC to restore US access after its 2022 settlement, following a limited US rollout in December 2025 focused on sports contracts.

item.title: Celsius founder Alex Mashinsky settles FTC case with $10M payment
item.description: The FTC order ties Mashinsky’s $10 million payment to a mostly suspended $4.72 billion judgment that can be revived over asset disclosures.

item.title: Judge Shoots Down Sam Bankman-Fried's Bid for New Trial
item.description: The judge dismissed the FTX founder’s claims that potential witnesses faced "government threats and retaliation" as "wildly conspiratorial.”

item.title: Canada proposes crypto ATM ban over scams and money laundering
item.description: Ottawa says Bitcoin ATMs have become a key tool for scammers, as regulators move to tighten oversight of high-risk parts of the crypto sector.

item.title: Bitcoin spot volumes across major exchanges have fallen to their lowest levels since October 2023. Such low volume environments often coincide with reduced market depth and heightened sensitivity to flow shifts 📊 glassno.de/4t2fxzK - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE81eHFVaE1LOVd5eWd6RnltYVBFOUJFRDlCY2VPcnZlSGVrU2MtNElJSXIwT3R1TmVsejFvY3c1dFFwdWItUndBcmlVbENTOXZqOG5jb0JzS3QxZWZfSnZn?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin spot volumes across major exch…

item.title: Bitcoin, stocks risk 'months' of losses as Kevin Warsh Becomes Fed chair
item.description: Bitcoin fell after each new Federal Reserve chair began work, data showed, while Kevin Warsh gave mixed signals over policy for risk assets.

item.title: There we go, #Bitcoin bouncing back upwards. FOMC today, GDP tomorrow. Lots of important events are coming up, and markets usually fall ahead of them. The bounce is strong, and it signals more upside from here. On lower timeframes, we see higher lows - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9uaFM2TGpCakgyQUhKY2NoQ1hNeDlUSGR3ekw3X1gyRmlYeEJHek04TUVMSVlYMDhZMjI0ZmF5WmRTUXlIeWxORWQzTlJoQktVa0ZiOTVVV0xnd0pfUlcybEdSTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">There we go, #Bitcoin bouncing b…

item.title: Polymarket denies data breach, says hacker is selling public data
item.description: The apparent hacker claimed to have breached other prediction markets and planned to release the data in the next few days.

item.title: Bullish brings Bitcoin options trading to Ripple Prime's institutional clients
item.description: The move allows institutions to trade Bitcoin options through a prime brokerage layer using existing accounts.

item.title: Aptos says its new privacy coin seeks to fix one of crypto’s biggest trade-offs
item.description: Aptos said its new privacy coin could be used to enable businesses to transact onchain without competitors tracking treasury moves and trading strategies.

item.title: 🔥 BIG: Michael Saylor says the endgame is to drive Bitcoin to $10M a coin and make Bitcoin a $200T network until it grows higher. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBmQmp6ZWJFYVNRT1N6S1pac21YNVB5c2hFRkcxVHZSRGFpUGRaMVFVdjRCbW4xbF9uMW1NZHZYZDduS09Ga3N2WGQwUzJheFhWbHg2OGRPYkM5bHJhb3Y3U3Jya1A?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 BIG: Michael Saylor says the…

item.title: 🚨 LATEST: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial partnered with a crypto project linked to a US-sanctioned scam-ring operators, per WSJ. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1uZWtLWk4tdzNjYXNjQ0NNTi15amM0VWV6TEd3eEhTLXBkbnlVdlpyc3ZUakVhVlV4ZjlxQ1FaZ3JzLXZrRHlyclhVSGhmMktqMmF5dVFqLUhSd2wwbkM0OG1BUFQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 LATEST: Trump-backed World L…

item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE90dDBBR1ZzSGdkMmc1Ym5iUDNqVlprLWU5S25wcU9MdUNqNzVNY1prMDZZX3ZTeTVpTVE0QU4xWl9RcGxwdUJkT2pDamdYRnJLdUNuVjJlSUJfVTZyTHQwUjQzaW8?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ NOW: CZ says, “agentic money…
